programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - MasterChef 2016 Grand Finale
programme.desc: Who will be crowned the winner of MasterChef Australia 2016?

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Auditions
programme.desc: The competition kicks off with 1000 amateur cooks.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Finding The Top 12
programme.desc: The Top 24 amateur cooks face three gruelling challenges.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - 12 Ways With Chicken
programme.desc: The Top 12 contestants move into a luxury home on Auckland's North Shore.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Signature Dish Challenge
programme.desc: The Top 11 contestants face a tough challenge in the MasterChef kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - A Day At The Races
programme.desc: The Top 10 contestants have a day at the races at Ellerslie.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Pie Wars
programme.desc: The Top 9 contestants must make their own pastry and cook two pies.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Canape Frenzy
programme.desc: The Top 8 contestants face a daunting team challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Asian Invention Test
programme.desc: The Top 7 contestants face a challenging invention test.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Seafood Barbecue Challenge
programme.desc: The Top 6 contestants face a team challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Super Hard Dessert
programme.desc: The new Top 6 contestants face their most technically-demanding challenge so far.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: The final five contestants cook a 10-course degustation dinner.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Cookbook Challenge
programme.desc: In the MasterChef New Zealand semi-final, the top four contestants try to impress.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - The Grand Final
programme.desc: The two finalists face gruelling challenges to decide who will win the first-ever MasterChef New Zealand.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP1
programme.desc: After a Toad in the Hole Masterclass from top chef John Torode, the four cooks try their hand.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP2
programme.desc: After a Masterclass in Thai chicken cakes from top chef John Torode, the four cooks try their hand.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP3
programme.desc: Whose dessert will launch presenters John and Nadia in to sweet orbit?

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP4
programme.desc: After a scrummy Berry pudding Masterclass from top chef John Torode, the four cooks have a bash.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP5
programme.desc: With only two semi final places up for grabs, the competition gets serious.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP6
programme.desc: Four aspiring chefs compete for a place in the quarter-final.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP7
programme.desc: After a scrummy Masterclass in scotch pancakes from top chef John Torode, it's the four cooks' turn.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP8
programme.desc: With a quarter final place to win, the competition heats up further as they make their tastiest food.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP9
programme.desc: With a quarter final place up for grabs, the competition reaches boiling point as they go all out to impress.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP10
programme.desc: In the second quarter-final, four heat winners compete to be the best cook in the country.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP11
programme.desc: The four remaining chefs must cook lunch for Doctor Who and his companion.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP12
programme.desc: They must prepare lunch for pop band JLS. Will their food be a hit with the boys?

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP13
programme.desc: The four best chefs battle it out to become crowned Junior Masterchef Champion 2010.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Auditions: Part 1
programme.desc: The heat is on. A fresh group of home cooks from around the country will eagerly tackle challenges that will see one of them take home the title and $250,000.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Auditions: Part 2
programme.desc: After the first-round cook, only 4 aprons remain. Who will have what it takes to impress the judges?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Auditions Part 3
programme.desc: In the final round of the judge's auditions, six contestants are vying for the final apron.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP19
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (19 out of 39)

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP20
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (20 out of 39)

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP1
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP2
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Mystery Box: Elena Duggan
programme.desc: The top 24 contestants enter the kitchen for their first mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Elimination Challenge: Hidden Pairs
programme.desc: Bottom 4 cook-off in the mystery pairs elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Judges' Mystery Box Challenge and Invention Test
programme.desc: Judges have placed their favourite ingredients into a mystery box and contestants will have to create a dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Pressure Test: Gary Mehigan's Roast Chicken, Peas and Potatoes
programme.desc: The contestants must keep up with Gary Mehigan as he prepares his classic roast chicken.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Immunity Challenge: Jarrod Di Blasi
programme.desc: The top three contestants now compete in creating a family meal for four in half-an-hour.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - 400 Gradi Team Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants are split into teams who must prepare four dishes for 250 hungry diners to avoid elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Potato Elimination Challenge + Masterclass Thu
programme.desc: The losing team from the Italian service challenge face elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Mystery Box: Ben Shewry
programme.desc: Contestants have 75 minutes to create a dish using ingredients from the mystery box.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Pressure Test: Andy Bowdy's Rita cake
programme.desc: The bottom three contestants now face a pressure test to recreate Andy Bowdy's Rita cake to avoid elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Immunity Challenge: Waffle Iron
programme.desc: The three best performers from the invention test are now vying for a chance at immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Team Challenge: Relay
programme.desc: The contestants are split into teams of four in a relay challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Elimination Challenge: Time Auction
programme.desc: The losing team now face elimination & the contestants have 90 minutes which they can use to buy ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Mystery Box: Delicious Dessert
programme.desc: Contestants have 90 minutes to create a dessert from the mystery box ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Pressure Test: Christy Tania's Ice Cream Float
programme.desc: The contestants have to recreate an ice cream float with helium-filled toffee balloon.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: The three best-performing contestants from the invention test compete for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Team Challenge: Edible Art Installation
programme.desc: Contestants will be working in teams to build an edible art installation.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Elimination Challenge: Blind Taste Test
programme.desc: The losing team from the greenhouse challenge now face elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Mystery Box Challenge & Invention Test
programme.desc: Contestants have 75 minutes to create a delicious dish from the mystery box of traditional Thai ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Pressure Test: Josue Lopez's After the Eucalypt Fire
programme.desc: The bottom three contestants from the invention test now cook-off in a three-hour pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: The three best performers in the invention test battle it out for the chance to cook for an immunity pin.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP23
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP24
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP25
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP26
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP27
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP28
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP29
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - The Bees Are So Angry
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars on a five stunt, 2 hour spectacular.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Leeches & Shaved Heads & Tear Gas
programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Snake Bite
programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Roach Coach
programme.desc: Four teams of two compete for $50,000 as they are locked in a cage and sunk underwater.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Broken Hearts & Blood Baths
programme.desc: Four teams of exes must deal with 3 stunts and each other.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Tall Crappacino
programme.desc: Four teams of two attempt to win $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Hee Haw! Hee Haw!
programme.desc: Four sets of twins compete for $50,000 as they are electric shocked.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Scorpion Tales
programme.desc: Four teams of family members compete for $50,000 as they careen into a quarry full of live ammunition.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP2
programme.desc: A mom-to-be tries to find one of five million-dollar cases, and surprises her husband.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP3
programme.desc: NASCAR's Jimmie Johnson drops by to meet a player from Rhode Island.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP4
programme.desc: The Banker offers a Detroit video-game fan the chance to become a game character.
